title: gum filter has no flag to force case-sensitive matching
body: `gum filter` uses github.com/sahilm/fuzzy for matching, which appears case-insensitive by default. For filtering things like environment variable names or git branches where case matters, it'd help to have a `--case-sensitive` flag alongside the existing filter options.

title: choose --selected-prefix count wrong when list is paginated
body: With `gum choose --no-limit --selected-prefix='> '` over a list long enough to paginate, toggling selections on items past the first page shows the prefix on the wrong visual row after scrolling — looks like the prefix rendering isn't accounting for the paginator's current window offset consistently.

title: gum spin gives no visual feedback when pty allocation fails on Windows
body: Running `gum spin -- long-command.exe` in a plain Windows terminal (not WSL) shows no spinner at all and just silently waits — no error, no fallback text. It looks like the pty setup in spin/pty.go may be failing silently instead of falling back to a non-pty exec path with the spinner still rendering.

title: Bash completion script doesn't include the format subcommand
body: After updating gum, `gum <TAB>` in bash still doesn't suggest `format` even though it's a documented subcommand. Looks like completion/bash.go's generated completion list may be out of sync with the current command set in gum.go.

title: TTY detection misfires when stdin is redirected from /dev/null in CI
body: In our CI pipeline, several gum-based scripts (choose, input) hang instead of failing fast when stdin is `/dev/null` — expected them to detect a non-interactive terminal and either error out or use the provided defaults, but internal/tty/tty.go's IsTTY check seems to think it has a usable terminal in this setup.
